skills.name: Rubric
skills.description: Read commandments imbued with the power of the Goddesses to deal Holy-property damage and reduce the enemy's movement speed.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 0. CaptionRatio2 seconds
Targets: CaptionRatio
Maximum Duration: CaptionRatio3 seconds

skills.name: Entity
skills.description: Make hidden entities nearby to reveal themselves with a powerful command. Revealed entities and those around the entity take a designated amount of damage.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Target: 10
Only 70% of the final damage is applied when not in stealth mode

skills.name: Aqua Benedicta
skills.description: Sprinkle Holy Water to purify the grounds. Enemies standing in the affected area is continuously damaged.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 0.5 seconds
Target: CaptionRatio
Duration: 7 seconds

skills.name: Engkrateia
skills.description: Exercise your strong restraint by praying to the Goddesses. During the prayer, you receive less damage and become immune to knockback and knockdown. Additional reduction applied to damage received from Devil type enemies or Dark property attacks.
skills.effect_text:
Damage Taken: - CaptionRatio %
Duration: CaptionRatio2 sec

skills.name: Gregorate
skills.description: Send out a wave of divine energy through yourself to overthrow the forces of evil. Nearby enemies receive Holy-property damage.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 5 times
Number of targets hit CaptionRatio3
Buff duration 60 seconds
Damage increased by CaptionRatio2 %

skills.name: Grand Cross
skills.description: Engrave holy pattern on the ground to attack the enemy.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 2 times per second
Circle duration 5 seconds

skills.name: Katadikazo
skills.description: Conjure a  spear of divine light to strike your enemies in the name of the goddesses. Targets hit by the spear receive Holy-property damage, with additional damage dealt to enemies that are taking damage from Aqua Benedicta.Korean Pop
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 3 times
Casting Time 0.5 seconds
Number of targets hit CaptionRatio2

attributes.name: Rubric: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Rubric] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Rubric: Propagate
attributes.description:
* Increases [Rubric]'s targets by 1 per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Rubric: Speed Reading
attributes.description:
* Accelerates [Rubric]'s damage cycle by 2x and reduces its duration by 2 seconds

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Entity: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Entity] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Aqua Benedicta: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Aqua Benedicta] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Engkrateia: Patience
attributes.description:
* Increases the duration of [Engkrateia] by 1 sec per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Engkrateia: The Goddess' Reply
attributes.description:
* Prevents your HP from going below 1 while [Engkrateia] is active

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Gregorate: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Gregorate] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Grand Cross: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Skill Factor of [Grand Cross] increases by

0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Katadikazo: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Katadikazo] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Katadikazo: Flame Spear
attributes.description: * Changes the property of [Katadikazo] to [Fire], and after the spear lands, fire remains and deals damage to enemies.

attributes.name: [Arts] Rubric: Corruption
attributes.description:
* Changes the [Rubric] property to [Dark]

* Rubric applied enemy gets [Attack Weakened] debuff and decreases Attack by 1% per debuff stack (Stacks up to [attribute level])

* Increases Rubric damage by 25%

attributes.description:
* Changes

* Buff lasts for [5 + skill level] seconds, Movement Speed increases by 10

* True-self revealed enemy increases damage received by 20% for 5 seconds

Overheat changed to 1 time
